gist.headline: Updated Pollen Packs
gist.blurb: We've updated our Pollen pack tiers to ensure sustainable growth for the hive. The checkout experience has also been streamlined for better reliability!
gist.summary: Updated the Pollen pack tier structure and refined the Stripe checkout metadata for better reliability.
gist.impact: Purchasing Pollen is now backed by a more robust checkout system with updated tier options.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a cozy shopkeeper, organizing a neat stack of golden pollen coins on a wooden counter, representing the updated store and checkout experience.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny shopkeeper apron, organizing a neat stack of glowing golden pollen coins on a wooden counter. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley shop vibes. Emotionally warm and inviting.
